displayTitle: Star Wars (1977) #77: Chanteuse of the Stars...
synopsis: Appearing for one issue only—the songstress who will melt your heart and shatter your wine glass. We mean none other than Leia Organa, "Chanteuse of the Stars." The rebel alliance may hinge on her ability to entertain a group of Ambassadors, and with her singing voice, (Dazzler she ain't!) the rebels may have to throw down their arms and surrender!
title: Star Wars (1977) #77: Chanteuse of the Stars...
